items.final_wording: Specifies cough duration, quality, timing, risk factors, and associated-symptom history domains.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Cough – 46
source.population: People presenting with cough; age limits are not stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth cough documentation; only partial for a general in-person workflow and for chronic-cough investigation pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies cough duration, quality, timing, risk factors, and associated-symptom history domains.

items.rationale: Supports sputum amount, colour and associated cough history for sputum symptom documentation; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Lists cough features that require serious-condition assessment or face-to-face escalation.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Cough – 46
source.population: People presenting with cough; age limits are not stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth cough documentation; only partial for a general in-person workflow and for chronic-cough investigation pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists cough features that require serious-condition assessment or face-to-face escalation.

items.rationale: Supports clinician-assessed cough warning prompts for sputum symptom documentation; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Supports clinician review of worsening breathlessness, cough, sputum production, and sputum colour change as exacerbation features without asserting an exacerbation diagnosis.

source.title: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease in over 16s: diagnosis and management
source.population: People aged over 16 years with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease.
source.setting: Primary and specialist COPD diagnosis, monitoring, and ongoing management.
source.exclusions: Exact for adult COPD follow-up and exacerbation-feature documentation; not applicable to children and not directly validated for UAE prescribing or referral pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports clinician review of worsening breathlessness, cough, sputum production, and sputum colour change as exacerbation features without asserting an exacerbation diagnosis.

items.rationale: Supports sputum change within COPD exacerbation features for sputum symptom documentation; no decision is generated.
